ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Proposed acquisition of GreenLedger Pte. Ltd. by Oriole Capital Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard)
Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of GreenLedger Pte. Ltd. by Oriole Capital Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard) — Project Tamarind
Transaction: Oriole to acquire 100% of GreenLedger for S$78,000,000 (S$58,000,000 cash; S$20,000,000 in new Oriole shares), with S$6,000,000 placed in escrow for 18 months.

Cyber & PDPA warranties: Seller warrants no undisclosed PDPA breach; diligence noted a March 2026 credential‑stuffing incident affecting 4,200 hashed emails, with remediation (MFA roll‑out, SIEM tuning) to be completed pre‑closing.
Conduct of business: Target to refrain from launching new DPT staking products pre‑closing without Buyer consent; ordinary course capex limited to S$1,500,000 per quarter.
Leak response: On leak or unusual trading, parties will notify SGX RegCo and issue a holding announcement; break fee of S$1,600,000 payable by Seller for wilful breach of exclusivity.
Long‑stop and closing: Signing target 30 July 2026; long‑stop 31 December 2026; completion upon satisfaction of CPs and share issue approval under Chapter 8 of the SGX Listing Manual.

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of GreenLedger Pte. Ltd. by Oriole Capital Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard) — Project Tamarind
Transaction: Oriole to acquire 100% of GreenLedger for S$78,000,000 (S$58,000,000 cash; S$20,000,000 in new Oriole shares), with S$6,000,000 placed in escrow for 18 months.
Earn-out: Up to S$12,000,000 contingent on (i) MAS in-principle approval for a Major Payment Institution (DPT) licence, and (ii) third-party verified 30% Scope 2 emissions reduction by FY2027.
Funding: Cash component to be funded via a private placement within the 20% limit under the SGX Listing Manual; wall-crossed investors to be placed on insider lists and ring-fenced by information barriers.
No tipping: No selective disclosure beyond approved wall-cross; cleansing announcement on SGXNET to be made upon signing.
Conditions precedent: Board approvals; SGX RegCo confirmation of the proposed announcement approach; MAS no‑objection (Payment Services Act); no material adverse cyber incident between signing and completion.
Cyber & PDPA warranties: Seller warrants no undisclosed PDPA breach; diligence noted a March 2026 credential‑stuffing incident affecting 4,200 hashed emails, with remediation (MFA roll‑out, SIEM tuning) to be completed pre‑closing.
Remedies: Specific indemnity for the March 2026 incident capped at S$5,000,000, assignment of cyber insurance proceeds to Buyer, and right of set‑off against earn‑out.
Employment/retention: Key employees (including CTO Mr. Hao Leong) to enter 24‑month retention and non‑compete; PDPA‑compliant notices for HR data transfer and employee consent.
Conduct of business: Target to refrain from launching new DPT staking products pre‑closing without Buyer consent; ordinary course capex limited to S$1,500,000 per quarter.
Blackout and dealing restrictions: Oriole directors and employees subject to immediate blackout from signing until cleansing; dealing window to reopen only after SGXNET announcement.
Leak response: On leak or unusual trading, parties will notify SGX RegCo and issue a holding announcement; break fee of S$1,600,000 payable by Seller for wilful breach of exclusivity.
Long‑stop and closing: Signing target 30 July 2026; long‑stop 31 December 2026; completion upon satisfaction of CPs and share issue approval under Chapter 8 of the SGX Listing Manual.
Non‑binding and disputes: This term sheet is non‑binding save for confidentiality, exclusivity, costs, and governing law; governed by Singapore law with SIAC arbitration; information‑barrier protocols to be maintained by the Company Secretary.
Contacts: For queries, contact Ms. Priya Tan (General Counsel, Oriole) at priya.tan@oriolecap.sg or +65 6123 4567; external counsel Seabreeze & Kota LLC (Mr. Adrian Chua) at achua@seabreezekota.com.
Benign ops note: The Compliance team will run an ESG and cyber hygiene lunch‑and‑learn on insider lists and information barriers for staff training only; this operational session is not market sensitive and contains no MNPI.
